title: platanus × acerifolia var. hispanica
intro: Platanus × acerifolia var. hispanica, commonly known as the London planetree, is a cultivar of the London plane tree, a deciduous tree known for its unique characteristics and benefits. This plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Platanus × acerifolia var. hispanica are numerous, with applications in reducing fever, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
